title: Rustic Pancakes
description: A rustic mod adding different types of edible Pancakes you can place in your world
body:
## About Cozy up your home by making your own 🥞 **Pancakes** 🥞! Similar to Cake, Pancakes can be placed decoratively as a block in your world. Right-click them to eat a pancake directly, or grab some shears to take a single pancake with you. Each pancake grants a different effect to help you on your journey! **Stay tuned for more features!** Have a bug or suggestion? [Join the Discord server!](https://discord.gg/zHYkT85E6p)
![Pancakes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cbbb2483353f71ebf702cae0c37b6675f9cdcb3.png) _Pancakes are a great way to make your home more cozy. Eat up to six servings for some extra energy._
## Features ### 🥣 Batter and Syrup The mod introduces two new ingredients: **Batter** and **Syrup**. All pancakes require **Batter** to craft, obtained with a Bowl, some Milk, an Egg and two Wheat. Some also require **Syrup**, obtained with a Glass Bottle, a Beetroot and some Sugar.
### 🥞 Pancakes Pancakes are currently available in the following flavors: Classic, Honey, Chocolate, Vegetable, Cherry Blossom and Pumpkin.
## My other mods

The pancakes from this mod are also available as part of a larger Farmer's Delight add-on that I made, Rustic Delight! This mod adds Cotton, Coffee, Bell Peppers, fried foods and more!
## Support

If you like my mod and want to support me on my Minecraft modding journey, consider ☕ buying me a coffee!
